things.name: Stone Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Swahili trading city with carved Arab doors, mosques and the slave market

things.name: Nungwi Beach
things.description: Powder-white sand and turquoise water at Zanzibar's most beautiful north coast beach

things.name: Prison Island (Changuu)
things.description: Giant Aldabra tortoises and clear water snorkelling on the former slave-holding island

things.name: Spice Tour
things.description: Half-day tour of clove, vanilla, cardamom, cinnamon and black pepper farms

things.name: Jozani Forest (Red Colobus Monkeys)
things.description: Only remaining forest on Zanzibar with the unique endangered Kirk's red colobus monkey

things.name: Dhow Sunset Cruise
things.description: Sailing on a traditional wooden dhow at sunset with dolphins frequent

things.name: Freddie Mercury's Birthplace
things.description: Birthplace of Queen frontman Freddie Mercury in the old Stone Town

things.name: Forodhani Gardens Night Market
things.description: Seafront evening market with Zanzibar pizza, fresh lobster and sugar cane juice

things.name: Pemba Island Diving
things.description: World-class wall diving on Zanzibar's pristine sister island with strong currents

things.name: Zanzibari Biryani
things.description: Spiced Zanzibar biryani with Indian Ocean seafood - the island's signature dish
